records.ety: [L. foedus league, treaty, compact; akin to fides faith: cf. F. fdral. see Faith.]

defs: Pertaining to a league or treaty; derived from an agreement or covenant between parties, especially between nations; constituted by a compact between parties, usually governments or their representatives.
quotes: The Romans compelled them, contrary to all federal right, . . . to part with Sardinia.

defs: Composed of states or districts which retain only a subordinate and limited sovereignty, as the Union of the United States, or the Sonderbund of Switzerland.
Consisting or pertaining to such a government; as, the Federal Constitution; a Federal officer.
Friendly or devoted to such a government; as, the Federal party. see Federalist.
